summary: Room and DM Rules/Settings Persistence with System-Message Rendering
changes: Hooked createSysMsg into saveRoomSettings — fires 'settings-changed' sysmsg after every room settings save
Hooked createSysMsg into room appearance save handler — fires 'appearance-changed' sysmsg after room appearance is saved
Extended fetchAndRenderNewSysMsgs with date-separator rows — inserts day-boundary separators between sysmsgs crossing midnight
Extended fetchAndRenderNewSysMsgs with compact grouping — when rules.allowCompact is true, consecutive same-compactGroup sysmsgs are merged into a single 'N changes' row
All sysmsg creation is fire-and-forget with caught errors to avoid blocking the save flow
